eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Clark, WA; Clackamas; Columbia; Multnomah; Washington, OR; at 11:33 AM on JAN 4, 2019 Effective until 1:33 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test ADR message issued by Clark Regional Emergency Services Agency.
